title: Continuity report
description: Written next to a chapter as <basename>.continuity.json by the continuity-editor subagent. The semantic continuity judgment (does the prose contradict the bible?) is an LLM's; the deterministic gate (check-continuity.mjs) enforces 'no high-severity conflict' + structural integrity of the state. Same split as content-review (LLM) + check-prepublish (script).
